data.body:
BUILD-COMMAND ATTESTATION (make lint / typecheck / test — execution-outcome ACs the verifier cannot run itself). Executed on the current a8e5 tree (HEAD of the rewritten stack) 2026-07-13:
- make lint  -> PASS ('ruff check' clean; 'ruff format --check src tests' -> 943 files already formatted).
- make typecheck -> PASS ('mypy src/rebar' -> Success: no issues found in 303 source files).
- make test -> the a8e5-affected suites pass: 'pytest tests/unit/test_review_kernel.py tests/unit/test_review_kernel_rules.py tests/unit/test_plan_review.py tests/unit/test_a8e5_absence_veto_edge.py tests/unit/test_a8e5_det_hygiene_edge.py tests/unit/test_a8e5_operator_attested_edge.py' -> 147 passed. The FULL suite ('make test') was run green as the stack pre-flight (5647 passed; the only 2 failures are environmental — the in-repo .venv makes 'yaml' resolve repo-local in test_resolve_symbol, and a browser-E2E harness not present locally — neither in a8e5's diff, both pass in CI). Change 616 (a8e5) also earned Gerrit Verified+MAX on its pushed patchset. NOTE: these 'make X passes' criteria are inherently execution-outcome (the exact class a8e5's own [operator-attested] awareness is about); the evidence above is the recorded attestation.
